div.h2: This Project vs. NGINX Worker Architecture
div.p: Single-threaded event loop (left) vs. multi-process scaled reactor (right)

g.text: reactor Phase 3 deferred queue | ngx_event_process_posted() posted list
write_buf + EPOLLOUT lifecycle | ngx_chain_t + write filter chain
single process, 10K conns | N workers x 10K/N conns = same total

text.tspan: Insert O(log n) | Find-min O(1) | Cancel O(log n)

g.text: N Worker Processes (one per CPU core)
read | ngx_event_t* | read event (≡ REACTOR_READ cb)
write | ngx_event_t* | write event (≡ REACTOR_WRITE cb)
recv | ngx_recv_pt | recv handler fn ptr
send | ngx_send_pt | send handler fn ptr
~10K/N conns per worker | sendfile() for static files

text.tspan: ngx_pool_t slab allocator (no malloc per request)
